name: RequestValidator rejects disallowed security patterns
description: Security test: ensure RequestValidator.validate_and_sanitize returns valid==False and errors include 'SECURITY_REJECTED' when raw_expression contains disallowed patterns such as 'import' or '__'.
output: Tuple (sanitized_expression, False, errors) where errors contains 'SECURITY_REJECTED'
success_criteria: Second element of return tuple (valid) is False
Sanitized expression returned (first element) is the trimmed original (or at least present) and not executed
error_scenarios: False negatives if regex patterns are miswritten and do not match malicious tokens
